q3: The final sentence was the thing I had to circle back to multiple times — the model kept landing somewhere close but not quite there, either tipping into gratitude framing or losing the momentum I needed. It took three separate rounds of options before we got a version that actually put the donor's decision at the center without making it feel like a thank-you. The rest of the piece came together more naturally, but that one structural instinct — centering the donor as a smart strategist rather than a generous benefactor — needed more nudging than it should have.
